title: Ordinance on the Prohibition and Abatement of Illegal Structures, Constructions, and All Kinds of Obstructions on Public Sidewalks, Drainage Systems and All Public Roads, in the Municipality of Los Baños, and Providing Penalties for Violation Therefor, and for Other Purposes. (AUTHOR: COUNCILWOMAN ARLENE P. DELOS SANTOS, 12/07/2020)
